title: Rapid
description: A rapid collection of performance, optimisation and gameplay mods. Built for Survival, and SMP players who require an FPS Boost and added gameplay features.
body:
# 📜 Description A simple, lightweight and efficient collection of **performance & utility** mods to make your Minecraft experience better. # 💾 Installation Guide Unfortunately the official Minecraft Launcher does not support modpack downloads automatically. Therefore, you will have to use a modpack launcher such as [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/app)
🍏 Modrinth Simply download the Modrinth Launcher > Create Profile [+] > From File > Import from File > Download Modpack
📁 Using a .zip Rapid uses Fabric; therefore, you need to prepare a Fabric instance to install the modpack. Download the .zip and export it into your Minecraft mods folder: ```c C:\Users\\AppData\Roaming\.minecraft\mods ```
# 🐛 Bugs Encountering bugs, crashes, or other problems? Feel free to open a ticket in the [Discord](https://discord.gg/DXzCQ9vUBt) for support! # ❓ FAQ
📦 Included Mods (46) ### ⚡ Performance (10)
  • Sodium by jellysquid3 (Improves rendering performance)
  • Lithium by jellysquid3 (General optimisations)
  • Starlight by spottedleaf (Lighting engine optimisations)
  • FerriteCore by malte0811 (Memory usage optimizations)
  • Immediately Fast by RaphiMC (Rendering optimisations)
  • Entity Culling by tr7zw (Block/Entities that are not visible are not rendered)
  • Concurrent Chunk Management by ishland (Chunks are loaded concurrently)
  • Memory Leak Fix by FX (Random memory leak fixes)
  • ModernFix by embeddedt (Performance and bug fixes)
  • ThreadTweak by getchoo (Improves and tweaks Minecraft CPU scheduling)
### 👁️ Visual Tweaks (18)
  • Iris by coderbot (Shader support)
  • Zoomify by isxander (Adds camera zooming)
  • Chat Heads by dzwdz (Adds player heads next to chat messages)
  • Detail Armor Bar by RedLime (Details armor bar icons)
  • Continuity by PepperCode1 (Adds connected textures)
  • Raised by yurisuika (Raises the hotbar)
  • Animatica by FoundationGames (More texture animations)
  • Entity Model Features by Traben (Entity model tweaks)
  • Entity Texture Features by Traben (Entity texture tweaks)
  • Gamma Utils by Sjouwer (Adds gamma customisation options - fullbright)
  • 3D Skin Layers by tr7zw (Makes outer-layers of skins appear 3D)
  • Capes by caelthecolher (Adds capes)
  • BetterF3 by TreyRuffy (Edits the F3 menu to be nicer)
  • Chat Patches by OBro1961 (Improves Minecraft chat)
  • Chat Animation by Ezzenix (Adds a smooth animation when opening chat)
  • Held Item Info by A5b84 (Shows information about the held item)
  • uku's Armor HUD by uku (Adds a widget with current armor items)
  • Fabric Skyboxes by AMereBagatelle (Allows texture packs to add custom skyboxes)
### 🍰 Extras (10)
  • ESSENTIAL Mod by SparkUniverse (Improves general experience)
  • Mod Menu by modmuss50 (Adds an in-game menu to configure mods)
  • Simple Voice Chat by henkelmax (Adds proximity voice chat)
  • Puzzle by Motschen (Provides optifine alternatives)
  • Bobby by Johni0702 (Allows greater render distances than the server)
  • Controlling by jaredlll08 (Adds a search bar in the controls menu)
  • Sodium Extra by FlashyReese (Adds more options to Sodium)
  • Reeses Sodium Options by FlashyReese (Alternate option menu for Sodium)
  • Better Ping Display by vladmarica (Displays ping as a number)
  • CIT Resewn by shsupercm (Re-implements MCPatcher's CIT)
### 🌵 Dependencies (8)
  • Fabric API by modmuss50
  • Indium by comp500
  • YetAnotherConfigLib by isxander
  • Cloth Config by shedaniel
  • Fabric Language Kotlin by modmuss50
  • Searchables by jaredlll08
  • Fabric Skyboxes by FlashyReese
  • ukulib by uku
💡 Can I use Optifine? No. This modpack acts as an Optifine alternative - you should not need to use Optifine.
# 🔗 Links [![Twitch Link](https://media.discordapp.net/attachments/1027907524151742504/1176189557570551828/Twitch.png)](https://twitch.tv/bitsquidd) [![Discord Link](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1027907524151742504/1176189942729285682/Discord.png)](https://discord.gg/DXzCQ9vUBt) [![Twitter Link](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1027907524151742504/1176189936215523459/Twitter.png)](https://twitter.com/bitsquidd)
